finding: Direct release-artifact follow-up commits created after taskflow close repeatedly trigger ATM_HOOK_COMMIT_ACTOR_NOT_EXPLICIT even when the commit message includes ATM-Actor, ATM-Task, and ATM-Surface trailers.
expectedBehavior: Release-artifact follow-up commits should have a governed path that passes explicit actor attribution without requiring a raw git commit fallback or misleading hook warning.
evidenceOrRepro: ATM-GOV-0228 release artifact commit a2ceb6f4f emitted ATM_HOOK_COMMIT_ACTOR_NOT_EXPLICIT; the same friction was previously observed during ATM-GOV-0231 release artifact publication.
followUp: Add a runner-sync release-artifact commit facade or teach the hook to recognize explicit ATM trailers/env for this post-close release-artifact lane.
